sources.title: The AI Search Manual - iPullRank
sources.note: Mike King's comprehensive multi-chapter publication documenting principles and methods for visibility in AI search, covering query fan-out, content resonance, measurement frameworks, prompt recipes, and GEO testing.

sources.title: The Science of SEO - Book
sources.note: Mike King's debut book decoding search algorithms, published by Wiley. Covers how modern search engines work including content engineering and AI-driven SEO.

sources.title: The 10x Content Engineer with Michael King - AirOps
sources.note: Interview and webinar recap with Mike King on AI-powered content engineering, RAG, prompt engineering, workflow automation, and scaling content production with AI.
